description: Update the primary facility details in LibreHealth EHR to match the new practice identity using the credentials admin/password. Update the main facility record with the following details: Name: LibreHealth Medical Center, Federal EIN: 12-3456789, Email: admin@librehealth.org, Website: https://www.librehealth.org, and Phone: 555-0199. Ensure the facility is designated as a Billing Location.
